tasks.label: Build and Flash Main App
tasks.command: rm -rf build && cmake -B build -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=cmake/gcc-arm-none-eabi.cmake && cmake --build build && "/Users/blurbler/Library/Application Support/stm32cube/bundles/gnu-tools-for-stm32/14.3.1+st.2/bin/arm-none-eabi-objcopy" -O binary build/Luftdruck-Sensor.elf build/Luftdruck-Sensor.bin && st-flash --connect-under-reset write build/Luftdruck-Sensor.bin 0x8000000 && echo successful

tasks.label: Build and Flash Test
tasks.command: rm -rf build/Bmp180Test && cmake -B build/Bmp180Test -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=cmake/gcc-arm-none-eabi.cmake -DBMP180_TEST=ON && cmake --build build/Bmp180Test && "/Users/blurbler/Library/Application Support/stm32cube/bundles/gnu-tools-for-stm32/14.3.1+st.2/bin/arm-none-eabi-objcopy" -O binary build/Bmp180Test/Luftdruck-Sensor.elf build/Bmp180Test/Luftdruck-Sensor.bin && st-flash --connect-under-reset write build/Bmp180Test/Luftdruck-Sensor.bin 0x8000000 && echo successful
